purpose: V2 keeps this copied filename as a compatibility pointer only. Active Gate 2 source-reality rules live in earthquake-source-reality.json.
source_reality_summary: NSCP and OBO evidence lanes may validly end as no public evidence found after sufficient search.
Post-earthquake tag and clearance lanes may validly end as no public answer found after sufficient search.
No missing public evidence may become a safety, compliance, tag, clearance, or permit conclusion.
guardrail: Gate 2 defaults to all four earthquake lanes unless the user narrows to one or more lanes. Gate 3 creates a parent audit run with child lane packets.
